text: Anh, Ba Noi khoe khong? Chu Nhat con goi.
Ba Noi on. Toi qua co hat theo may bai Trinh Cong Son. Chu Nhat goi 9 gio sang gio Houston.
Chau Andrew, Co gui hinh cay mai truoc nha. Chi Hoa co khoe khong?
Da Co, Me on. Chau cam on Co. Chau se goi Chu Nhat tuan sau.
Anh Andrew, gui lai setlist thang 12 - them 2 bai TCS.
OK Minh. Confirm Lotus Dec 5. Setlist theo Airtable.
Andrew - sent you the email. Short version: Trazodone conservative, only if past 10pm.
Copy Danny. Cam on anh. Call Sunday 8am if you're up.
Ba, Sunday 9am works. Bringing HCPOA copy.
Ba, Ironworks slammed. Skip Sunday call, catch you next week?
Copy Marcus. Take care of the shop. Talk soon.
